name: seo-tool
description: Internal SEO Operating System foundation monorepo.

scripts.test: npm run build && NODE_ENV=test node --test --test-concurrency=1 packages/domain-model/dist/test/*.test.js apps/api/dist/test/*.test.js services/crawler/dist/test/*.test.js services/mcp/dist/test/*.test.js
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run check:boundaries && npm run validate:openapi && npm test
